'''âv-z-j-w''' ('''kavazjewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:charcoalize|charcoalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:charcoalize|charcoalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-z-j-w
|-
! Lemma
| kavazjewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivazjewoko|thivazjewoko]] || [[word:jivazjewoko|jivazjewoko]] || [[word:shivazjewoko|shivazjewoko]] || [[word:kivazjewoko|kivazjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvazjewoko|thuthuvazjewoko]] || [[word:jujuvazjewoko|jujuvazjewoko]] || [[word:shushuvazjewoko|shushuvazjewoko]] || [[word:kukuvazjewoko|kukuvazjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvazjewoko|thuvazjewoko]] || [[word:juvazjewoko|juvazjewoko]] || [[word:shuvazjewoko|shuvazjewoko]] || [[word:kuvazjewoko|kuvazjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvazjewoko|thuvazjewoko]] || [[word:juvazjewoko|juvazjewoko]] || [[word:shuvazjewoko|shuvazjewoko]] || [[word:kuvazjewoko|kuvazjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevazjewoko|thevazjewoko]] || [[word:jevazjewoko|jevazjewoko]] || [[word:shevazjewoko|shevazjewoko]] || [[word:kevazjewoko|kevazjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovazjewoko|thothovazjewoko]] || [[word:jojovazjewoko|jojovazjewoko]] || [[word:shoshovazjewoko|shoshovazjewoko]] || [[word:kokovazjewoko|kokovazjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovazjewoko|thovazjewoko]] || [[word:jovazjewoko|jovazjewoko]] || [[word:shovazjewoko|shovazjewoko]] || [[word:kovazjewoko|kovazjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovazjewoko|thovazjewoko]] || [[word:jovazjewoko|jovazjewoko]] || [[word:shovazjewoko|shovazjewoko]] || [[word:kovazjewoko|kovazjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvazjewoko|thĂŠvazjewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvazjewoko|jĂŠvazjewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvazjewoko|shĂŠvazjewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvazjewoko|kĂŠvazjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavazjewoko|thathavazjewoko]] || [[word:jajavazjewoko|jajavazjewoko]] || [[word:shashavazjewoko|shashavazjewoko]] || [[word:kakavazjewoko|kakavazjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavazjewoko|thavazjewoko]] || [[word:javazjewoko|javazjewoko]] || [[word:shavazjewoko|shavazjewoko]] || [[word:kavazjewoko|kavazjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavazjewoko|thavazjewoko]] || [[word:javazjewoko|javazjewoko]] || [[word:shavazjewoko|shavazjewoko]] || [[word:kavazjewoko|kavazjewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shavazjewithi|shavazjewithi]] || [[word:shavazjewiji|shavazjewiji]] || [[word:shavazjewishi|shavazjewishi]] || [[word:shavazjewiki|shavazjewiki]]
